documentation.description: The autopilot is requesting a resource (file, binary, other type of data)

record_types.name: Resource_Request

fields.name: Request_Id
fields.description: Request ID. This ID should be reused when sending back URI contents

fields.name: Uri_Type
fields.description: The type of requested URI. 0 = a file via URL. 1 = a UAVCAN binary

fields.name: Uri
fields.description:
The requested unique resource identifier (URI). It is not
necessarily a straight domain name (depends on the URI type enum)

fields.name: Transfer_Type
fields.description:
The way the autopilot wants to receive the URI. 0 = MAVLink FTP. 1 =
binary stream.

fields.name: Storage
fields.description:
The storage path the autopilot wants the URI to be stored in. Will
only be valid if the transfer_type has a storage associated (e.g.
MAVLink FTP).
